To FIFA,

Your silence regarding controversial refereeing decisions has disappointed many football fans. When official explanations are absent, doubts grow and trust in the fairness of competitions is weakened.

Football belongs to the fans, and supporters have the right to understand how major refereeing decisions are evaluated. We call for greater transparency and accountability, because fairness must not only exist—it must also be seen by everyone.

We hope FIFA will provide clearer explanations and continue improving refereeing standards and VAR procedures to ensure equal treatment for all teams.
